name: gen
description: Genorah v4.5.4 — Bundled MCP servers fixed: .mcp.json moved to the plugin root so Claude Code's loader actually starts gpt-image, graphify, 3dsvg-export and the rest (they never loaded from .claude-plugin/.mcp.json). The localhost:4455 cockpit is now interactive, with a dedicated full-page Knowledge Graph view at /graph (linked from the header): click any section for a detail drawer (the full per-failure check+detail, SUMMARY and PLAN, via a lazy path-locked /api/section endpoint), open screenshots in a keyboard-navigable lightbox, and filter sections by verdict + name — atop the Awwwards-level, DNA-themed v4.4 redesign (instant-read stat band, bento layout, tier-colored verdicts, prefers-reduced-motion-gated motion), all on the zero-dependency stack with presentation logic in a pure, unit-tested view-model the browser imports from the server. 108-agent A2A L4 pipeline (10 directors + 98 workers), 42 Design Archetypes (25 seed + 17 WebGPU-native), 394-pt two-axis quality gate (254 Design Craft + 140 UX Integrity), 10 MCP integrations. 9 npm packages shipping typed Result<T> protocol, persistent single-canvas 3D runtime (R3F + Theatre.js + GSAP + Lenis), recipe-driven photoreal asset pipeline (Rodin + Meshy + Flux Kontext + Recraft + Kling + gpt-image), generative archetype synthesis, Living Systems runtime, signature DNA forge, sqlite-vec cross-project memory graph, Deno-sandboxed agent marketplace, offline-first mode, server-driven UI renderer, WebGPU UI effects. From discovery to ship, measurably enforced quality end-to-end.
